optional description per ZAP baseline fo: Timestamp Disclosure — server-date headers; informational, not exploitable
Information Disclosure: Suspicious Comments — build hashes in JS bundles
CSP Scanner — warn until CSP policy is locked down for all routes
Content Security Policy Not Set — pages with Clerk-injected scripts may vary
Loosely Scoped Cookie — Clerk session cookies have broad subdomain scope by design
Storable and Cacheable Content — static Next.js pages are intentionally cached
Retrieved from Cache — CDN cache hits are expected; not a vulnerability
Cookie Without SameSite Attribute — third-party Stripe/Clerk cookies; not our code
X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing — set via securityHeaders in next.config.ts for all routes (source: "/(.*)")
